assignments.title: Strategy assignment
assignments.subtitle: Change the active strategy of a Game or a Task. Select several games to reassign them in bulk. The available custom strategies are the ones published in your realm.
assignments.selectAllAria: Select all games on this page
assignments.totalSummary_one: {{count}} game in total · {{custom}} with a custom strategy on this page.
assignments.totalSummary_other: {{count}} games in total · {{custom}} with a custom strategy on this page.
assignments.noGames: There are no games in this realm.

confirm.title: Confirm reassignment
confirm.bulk_one: You are about to reassign {{count}} game to {{target}}. If it already has that strategy, it is skipped.
confirm.bulk_other: You are about to reassign {{count}} games to {{target}}. Those that already have that strategy are skipped.

errors.loadIndex: Could not load the strategy index.
errors.loadTasks: Could not load the tasks of {{id}}.

picker.title: Choose a strategy
picker.emptyCustom: There are no published custom strategies. Create one in the editor and publish it.

errors.loadCustoms: Could not load the custom strategies.

history.title: Version history
history.identical: The two versions are structurally identical.

confirm.body: You are about to re-publish v{{version}} and archive the currently published version. All Games and Tasks that pointed to the active version will be redirected automatically. Continue?

library.title: My strategies
library.subtitle: All the custom strategies in your realm. Open them to keep editing, duplicate them as a starting point, or publish them so they can be assigned to games and tasks.

empty.text: You haven't created any strategy yet. Start from scratch or from a template.

confirm.publishBody: On publish, v{{version}} of «{{name}}» becomes the production version assignable to games and tasks. Any previous published version with the same name is archived automatically.
confirm.archiveBody: Archiving «{{name}}» (v{{version}}) takes it out of circulation: it can no longer be edited or published, though its history stays available.

success.publish: «{{name}}» published (v{{version}}). It is now the production version.

usage.title: Where is «{{name}}» used?
usage.assignedTo: This version is assigned to {{games}} and {{tasks}}.
usage.tailReassign: Reassigning them will move them to another strategy.
usage.tailSafe: Nobody uses it: it is safe to archive.

errors.load: Could not load the strategy usage.

templates.title: Choose a template
templates.empty: No templates available. Ask the administrator to add files under app/engine/dsl_templates/user/.
